title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (TypeScript, NestJS, React) – Remote (Turkey)
description: We’re Hiring: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (TypeScript / NestJS / React) We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to contribute to the development and scaling of our legal case management platform’s backend, frontend, and cloud infrastructure. Key Responsibilities Design and develop core workflow, case, and task management systems Deliver AI-assisted features, including case summaries, legal Q&A, and structured outputs Own features end-to-end across backend and frontend Design and manage database schemas and production-safe migrations Improve reliability of asynchronous and event-driven processes (queues, retries, idempotency) Build and maintain integrations with external systems, including AWS services, Stripe, and HubSpot Technology Stack Backend: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Prisma, MySQL Frontend: React 19, Vite, TanStack Router / Query / Table, Tailwind CSS Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (S3, SQS, SNS, Lambda, Secrets Manager) Tooling: Jest, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier Qualifications 3+ years of professional software engineering experience Strong TypeScript expertise across backend and frontend Hands-on production experience with NestJS or equivalent Node.js architectures Strong React experience building data-intensive user interfaces Solid experience with relational databases, schema design, and migrations Proven ability to debug and operate asynchronous or distributed systems in production Clear written communication skills and a strong sense of ownership Preferred Experience Experience with legal-tech or workflow-heavy B2B SaaS platforms Stripe billing and payments implementation HubSpot or CRM system integrations Practical experience applying LLMs or prompt engineering in production environments How We Work Strong emphasis on ownership and pragmatic engineering standards Clear planning, checklist-driven execution, and fast iteration Focus on quality, reliability, and consistent delivery
